mapper.insert: INSERT INTO serverdb.crash_data (account_name, ip, version, address, flags, code, eax, ecx, edx, ebx, esp, ebp, esi, edi, eip, date_received) VALUES (#{accountName}, #{ip}, #{version}, #{address}, #{flags}, #{code}, #{eax}, #{ecx}, #{edx}, #{ebx}, #{esp}, #{ebp}, #{esi}, #{edi}, #{eip}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
